_schema: DialogueProfile v2 — scripted nodes + LLM fallback. One file per NPC (id = NPCNode.dialogueId).

_modes.scripted: Triggered by firstMeetingOnly, flag condition, or probability roll. Lines display directly; DM is bypassed. Choices are shown as buttons.
_modes.llm: Fires when no trigger matches. DM generates freely using defaultContext + relationship history.

defaultContext: Speech style for LLM-mode dialogue: vocabulary, tone, speaking rhythm, topics this NPC will/won't discuss, typical reaction to repeat visitors. Do NOT describe personality (already in NPC publicDescription/secretLayers). Template variables like {user} are supported.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Narrator line — sets the scene before NPC speaks.

lines.speaker: player
lines.text: Player action descriptor — shown as > text

choices.text: What the player says or does (shown on button)

triggers._comment_condition: Optional: flag expression that must be true
triggers._comment_probability: Optional: 0-100 roll chance (default 100). Evaluated after condition.

milestones.label: Design note: what this milestone represents (not injected into prompt)
milestones.context: Injected into DM prompt for LLM-mode dialogue when condition is true. Describe what the NPC knows/feels/plans in this situation.
milestones.permanentSummary: One sentence for NPC long-term memory. Required if isPermanent is true.
